info.title: Chr.Avro.Cli
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 C.H. Robinson
create           Create an Avro schema for a .NET type.
generate         Generate C# code for a schema from the Schema Registry or
stdin.
registry-get     Retrieve a schema from the Schema Registry.
registry-test    Verify that a .NET type is compatible with a schema in the
Schema Registry.
help             Display more information on a specific command.
version          Display version information.
